basics.name: Byungwoo Yoo
basics.label: CTO / Software Engineer
basics.summary: Inspired by a professor's words, 'You should dedicate yourself to the country and its people because you received high-quality education at a lower cost,' I have been driven to make people's lives more convenient worldwide. As a core developer of LINE Messenger, used by 600 million people globally, and with experiences in entrepreneurship and exit in the US, as well as leading AI labs at top ed-tech companies, I currently serve as CTO at Datarize.

work.name: Datarize
work.summary: A CRM SaaS platform for e-commerce operators
highlights: Established technical roadmaps and managed hiring and organization for BE, FE, Data, QA, and SDK chapters
Led the company's AX transformation and AI hackathon, resulting in the launch of three AI products
Designed enterprise-oriented APIs and handled technical sales

work.name: Mathpresso
work.position: VP of Engineering / AI Lab Lead
work.summary: Operator of QANDA, an AI-based math problem-solving search platform
highlights: Led the only profitable B2B AI business unit, used by major companies like Mirae, Visang, and YBM
Led multiple AI research projects (ML, search, auto calculator, and content DB construction)
Redesigned search and ML services based on domain-driven design, reducing infrastructure costs by over 50%

work.name: Kasa Korea
work.summary: Operator of Kasa, a blockchain-based real estate revenue investment and trading platform
highlights: Oversaw the development of various features for API servers and trading engines, leading to the launch of the service

work.name: Buzzvil
work.summary: Operator of Buzzscreen, the world's largest smartphone lock screen advertising platform (used by over 2 million people daily)
highlights: Developed and oversaw the logic for advertising and content allocation on Buzzscreen
Optimized search functionality, reducing infrastructure costs by 75% and providing faster response times
As a software architect, guided other engineers in building robust and sustainable microservices using Clean Architecture and DDD, ensuring zero downtime

work.name: Slidejoy
work.summary: A US-based startup acquired by Buzzvil
highlights: Reached break-even point and secured investments before being acquired
Designed and developed the service using ad networks, and introduced Spring Boot for the backend

work.name: NAVER
highlights: Improved transmission rates (from 75% to 99.5%) as the lead developer of NNI (NHN Notification Infra), a core library for LINE, and gained experience with overseas deployments and on-site debugging
Developed and contributed the Android version of the Netty network library as open-source
Introduced MVP software design, significantly enhancing team performance

work.name: InfoBank / DOSA
work.summary: Worked at InfoBank and DOSA as part of my military service
highlights: Participated in the development of m&Talk and Samsung ChatON

education.area: Department of Electrical Engineering (minor in Business Administration)

publications.name: Explain with Visual Keypoints Like a Real Mentor! A Benchmark for Multimodal Solution Explanation

volunteer.summary: Provided AI policy and technical advice to Gyeonggi Province
highlights: Advised on and technically reviewed the Gyeonggi Province generative AI construction project
